notes: Phase 6 (Naxxramas). Best in Slot from the Icy Veins WoW Classic Era Balance Druid Ranged Dps gear guide. Rings/Trinkets: the source lists 2-4 ranked options in one row (you equip two) — split here into two named slots, top pick in slot 1; combined source text kept for both. Classic Era predates gem sockets entirely (introduced in Cataclysm) — no gems section applies.

items.name: Ring of the Fallen God
items.source: Reward from the quest you get from turning in the eye that drops from C'Thun in AQ40 Noth the Plaguebringer in Naxxramas
